spec.title: Traffic
spec.description: The traffic exchanged from the gateway to the nodes

spec.title: Connectivity
spec.description: Check connection between local cluster and peered cluster.

spec.title: Connected clusters
spec.description: The number of peered clusters which have passed the connection check.

spec.title: Aggregated cross-cluster traffic (TX)
spec.description: The sum of the cross-cluster traffic from all peers.

spec.title: Aggregated cross-cluster traffic (RX)
spec.description: The sum of the cross-cluster traffic from all peers.

spec.title: Wireguard implementation
spec.description: Describe which wireguard implementation Liqo is using, between "kernel" and "userspace".

spec.title: Cross-cluster traffic
spec.description: The traffic exchanged with the selected peer.

spec.title: Traffic
spec.description: The traffic exchanged from the gateway to the nodes

spec.title: Aggregated internal-cluster traffic (RX)
spec.description: The sum of the internal-cluster traffic. It sums the traffic forwarded by the geneve tunnels per remote clusters

spec.title: Aggregated internal-cluster traffic (TX)
spec.description: The sum of the cross-cluster traffic from all peers.

spec.title: Total Geneve Tunnels
spec.description: The number of total geneve tunnels in your cluster
